news.title: Adidas, Lenovo among companies in China giving workers a World Cup final holiday
news.lede: Several corporations in mainland China have announced a full day or a half day off for their employees next Monday so that they can enjoy the Fifa World Cup final to the fullest. European champions Spain will take on reigning champions Argentina at MetLife Stadium on Sunday afternoon to bring the 39-day tournament to a close. A win for Luis de la Fuente’s side will see the Spaniards adding to their previous title from 2010, while a victory for the world’s top team and three-time champions will make Lionel Scaloni the first head coach ever to defend a World Cup.

news.title: Soccer fans invited to cheer Spain to World Cup victory
news.lede: Embassy Suites invites fans to cheer on "La Roja" as they battle Argentina during Sunday's World Cup championship match at the New York New Jersey Stadium. For more than a month, the Spanish National Soccer Team trained at Baylor School and stayed at the Embassy Suites in downtown Chattanooga preparing for their run to the finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Embassy Suites is now inviting local fans to cheer on "La Roja" as they battle Argentina during Sunday's championship match at the New York New Jersey Stadium. The hotel is hosting a watch party this weekend at the place where it all began for Spain.

news.title: World Cup 2026: Slow progress for Africa after late goals and underdog success
news.lede: Cape Verde reached the last 32 on their World Cup debut and Egypt registered a first win at the finals but Senegal will rue the manner of their exit. Africa sent its largest ever contingent to the 2026 Fifa World Cup, but while there were undoubtedly some great storylines, how successful was the tournament overall for the 10 teams who travelled? After nine nations made it into the knockout stage, Confederation of African Football (Caf) boss Patrice Motsepe said they had made the continent's 1.6 billion people proud. But only Morocco made it to the quarter-finals, while exiting after conceding late goals was a recurring fate which befell five sides - with Senegal and Egypt squandering two-goal leads as they crashed out in dramatic style.

news.title: The World Cup champions will receive championship rings for the first time in history
news.lede: The 2026 World Cup final between Sapin and Argentina will have a historic and unprecedented finale in the history of football. 'FIFA reports that "the champions of the FIFA World Cup will receive custom championship rings, bringing one of the most recognizable American sports traditions to world football".' "Besides the iconic trophy and the prestigious gold medals, the winning team will receive, for the first time in a FIFA competition, an additional recognition: personalized championship rings. In this way, FIFA is bringing into football one of the most deeply rooted traditions in American sports," FIFA said in a statement.

news.cat: THE LIBRARY OF ECONOMICS AND LIBERTY
news.title: A World Cup Final Through Austrian Eyes
news.lede: By Giacomo Balbinotto Neto, Jul 17 2026. Imagine that history made one small exception. For one evening only, time stopped separating generations. High above the noise of a packed World Cup final game, in a quiet corner of the grandstand untouched by television cameras, eight elderly gentlemen quietly took their seats.

news.title: What food and drink will cost fans at World Cup final – and how MetLife’s prices compare to other venues
news.lede: Like a lot of things, concessions haven't been cheap during this tournament. What should people expect to spend at Sunday's showpiece?

news.title: An NFL guide to dealing with the World Cup final’s extended halftime show
news.lede: The World Cup halftime pause is expected to last slightly longer than normal. NFL players have plenty of experience with such delays.

news.title: World Cup winners to be presented with championship rings in tournament first
news.lede: FIFA described it as "bringing one of the most recognisable American sporting traditions to the global game".
